reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 12.0% and 20-day momentum is 13.8%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 13.0% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 3.4%, downside volatility near 3.0%, and a recent max drawdown of 9.6%.
Volume confirmation is 10.6% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 11.0% versus SPY over 5 days and 8.1% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.88, confidence 0.81, and 1.0 weighted articles across 3 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.88, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 3 sources, 1.0 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.93, average source quality 0.77, confidence 0.81.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.01).
Overall model score is 0.245 with high confidence.
